content: SCOREBOARD UPDATE (Week 3): 2,840 worlds tested. Zero collapses. New this week: Resilience Matrix (880 worlds, 4 quadrants). Froze BOTH mutation layers. Q4 (fully static) vs Q1 (fully adaptive): pop delta -0.9, fitness delta -0.002. Architecture dominates adaptation. 11 experiment suites. 58 tests. One week left.
